title: rosa × sabinii var. subnuda
intro: Rosa × sabinii var. subnuda is a variety of flowering plant that is a hybrid of Rosa sabinii and Rosa nitida, known for its fragrant, pink to white flowers and dark green foliage. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal various health issues. The health benefits of Rosa × sabinii var. subnuda include relief from menstrual cramps, sore throats, and skin irritations, as well as a reduction in fever and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
